examples: I heard a gush of water.
You can gush, fume or whine - anything goes.
In a moment more, the crowd began to gush forth from the doors of the church.
Fracked wells have been known to gush at 100 times the initial rate of an average vertical well.
Even if a gush of development funds is released, aid pipelines, and America's in particular, are notoriously long and twisted.
